title: Betser #1221
definition:
Bezer = "gold ore" or "remote fortress"

 n pr m
 1) son of Zophah, one of the heads of the houses of Asher

 n pr loc
 2) a city of refuge in Reuben in the downs on the east of the Jordan
nasbUsage:
Definition: Bezer = "gold ore" or "remote fortress"

 n pr m
 1) son of Zophah, one of the heads of the houses of Asher

 n pr loc
 2) a city of refuge in Reuben in the downs on the east of the Jordan

    NASB:  fortress, a city in Reuben, also a desc. of Asher
